ddls:
CREATE TABLE "restaurants" (
  "restaurant_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each restaurant */,
  "restaurant_name" TEXT /* Name of the restaurant */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the restaurant */,
  "city" TEXT /* City where the restaurant is located */,
  "state" TEXT /* State where the restaurant is located */,
  "zipcode" TEXT /* Zipcode of the restaurant */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the restaurant */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the restaurant */,
  "website" TEXT /* Website URL of the restaurant */,
  "opening_time" TEXT /* Opening time of the restaurant */,
  "closing_time" TEXT /* Closing time of the restaurant */,
  "capacity" INTEGER /* Seating capacity of the restaurant */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("restaurant_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_restaurants_city FOREIGN KEY ("city") REFERENCES cities ("city_name"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_restaurants_state FOREIGN KEY ("state") REFERENCES states ("state_name"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_restaurants_zipcode FOREIGN KEY ("zipcode") REFERENCES zipcodes ("zipcode")
)

CREATE TABLE "cities" (
  "city_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each city */,
  "city_name" TEXT /* Name of the city */,
  "state" TEXT /* State where the city is located */,
  "latitude" REAL /* Latitude of the city */,
  "longitude" REAL /* Longitude of the city */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("city_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "states" (
  "state_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each state */,
  "state_name" TEXT /* Name of the state */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country where the state is located */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("state_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "zipcodes" (
  "zipcode_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each zipcode */,
  "zipcode" TEXT /* Zipcode of the restaurant */,
  "city_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the city where the restaurant is located */,
  "latitude" REAL /* Latitude of the zipcode */,
  "longitude" REAL /* Longitude of the zipcode */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("zipcode_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "menus" (
  "menu_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each menu */,
  "restaurant_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the restaurant */,
  "menu_name" TEXT /* Name of the menu */,
  "menu_type" TEXT /* Type of the menu (e.g., breakfast, lunch, dinner) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Brief description of the menu */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the menu (e.g., active, inactive) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("menu_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_menus_restaurant_id FOREIGN KEY ("restaurant_id") REFERENCES restaurants ("restaurant_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "menu_items" (
  "item_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each menu item */,
  "menu_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the menu */,
  "item_name" TEXT /* Name of the menu item */,
  "price" REAL /* Price of the menu item */,
  "description" TEXT /* Brief description of the menu item */,
  "image_url" TEXT /* URL of an image for the menu item */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the menu item (e.g., active, inactive) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("item_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_menu_items_menu_id FOREIGN KEY ("menu_id") REFERENCES menus ("menu_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "ingredients" (
  "ingredient_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each ingredient */,
  "item_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the menu item */,
  "ingredient_name" TEXT /* Name of the ingredient */,
  "quantity" REAL /* Quantity of the ingredient used */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("ingredient_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_ingredients_item_id FOREIGN KEY ("item_id") REFERENCES menu_items ("item_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "staff" (
  "staff_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each staff member */,
  "restaurant_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the restaurant */,
  "staff_name" TEXT /* Full name of the staff member */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the staff member (e.g., server, chef, manager) */,
  "role_description" TEXT /* Brief description of the staff role */,
  "hire_date" TEXT /* Date when the staff member was hired */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("staff_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_staff_restaurant_id FOREIGN KEY ("restaurant_id") REFERENCES restaurants ("restaurant_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reservations" (
  "reservation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each reservation */,
  "restaurant_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the restaurant */,
  "customer_name" TEXT /* Name of the customer */,
  "reservation_time" TEXT /* Time of the reservation */,
  "reservation_date" TEXT /* Date of the reservation */,
  "party_size" INTEGER /* Size of the party */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the reservation (e.g., pending, confirmed, cancelled) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("reservation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reservations_restaurant_id FOREIGN KEY ("restaurant_id") REFERENCES restaurants ("restaurant_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "orders" (
  "order_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each order */,
  "restaurant_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the restaurant */,
  "customer_name" TEXT /* Name of the customer */,
  "order_time" TEXT /* Time the order was placed */,
  "order_date" TEXT /* Date the order was placed */,
  "total_price" REAL /* Total price of the order */,
  "payment_method" TEXT /* Payment method used for the order */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the order (e.g., pending, in_progress, completed) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("order_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_orders_restaurant_id FOREIGN KEY ("restaurant_id") REFERENCES restaurants ("restaurant_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "order_items" (
  "order_item_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each order item */,
  "order_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the order */,
  "item_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the menu item */,
  "quantity" INTEGER /* Quantity of the menu item in the order */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("order_item_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_order_items_item_id FOREIGN KEY ("item_id") REFERENCES menu_items ("item_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_order_items_order_id FOREIGN KEY ("order_id") REFERENCES orders ("order_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "feedback" (
  "feedback_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each feedback entry */,
  "restaurant_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the restaurant */,
  "customer_name" TEXT /* Name of the customer */,
  "rating" INTEGER /* Rating given by the customer */,
  "comments" TEXT /* Comments provided by the customer */,
  "feedback_date" TEXT /* Date when the feedback was submitted */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("feedback_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "inventory" (
  "inventory_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each inventory entry */,
  "restaurant_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the restaurant */,
  "ingredient_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the ingredient */,
  "quantity" REAL /* Quantity of the ingredient in stock */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("inventory_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_inventory_restaurant_id FOREIGN KEY ("restaurant_id") REFERENCES restaurants ("restaurant_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_inventory_ingredient_id FOREIGN KEY ("ingredient_id") REFERENCES ingredients ("ingredient_id")
)
